original_query:
SELECT
    rt.role AS role_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS movie_count,
    AVG(t.production_year) AS avg_release_year,
    MIN(mi_idx.info) AS lowest_rank_info,
    MAX(mi_idx.info) AS highest_rank_info
FROM title t
JOIN cast_info ci
    ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN role_type rt
    ON ci.role_id = rt.id
JOIN movie_link ml
    ON t.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN link_type lt
    ON ml.link_type_id = lt.id
JOIN movie_keyword mk
    ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k
    ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN movie_info_idx mi_idx
    ON t.id = mi_idx.movie_id
JOIN info_type it
    ON mi_idx.info_type_id = it.id
JOIN complete_cast cc
    ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN comp_cast_type cct
    ON cc.subject_id = cct.id
WHERE rt.role = 'actor'
  AND lt.link = 'references'
  AND t.id IN (
        SELECT
            mc.movie_id
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name cn
            ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        WHERE cn.country_code = '[gb]'
    )
GROUP BY
    rt.role
ORDER BY
    movie_count DESC;
executed_query:
EXPLAIN SELECT
    rt.role AS role_type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS movie_count,
    AVG(t.production_year) AS avg_release_year,
    MIN(mi_idx.info) AS lowest_rank_info,
    MAX(mi_idx.info) AS highest_rank_info
FROM title t
JOIN cast_info ci
    ON t.id = ci.movie_id
JOIN role_type rt
    ON ci.role_id = rt.id
JOIN movie_link ml
    ON t.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN link_type lt
    ON ml.link_type_id = lt.id
JOIN movie_keyword mk
    ON t.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k
    ON mk.keyword_id = k.id
JOIN movie_info_idx mi_idx
    ON t.id = mi_idx.movie_id
JOIN info_type it
    ON mi_idx.info_type_id = it.id
JOIN complete_cast cc
    ON t.id = cc.movie_id
JOIN comp_cast_type cct
    ON cc.subject_id = cct.id
WHERE rt.role = 'actor'
  AND lt.link = 'references'
  AND t.id IN (
        SELECT
            mc.movie_id
        FROM movie_companies mc
        JOIN company_name cn
            ON mc.company_id = cn.id
        WHERE cn.country_code = '[gb]'
    )
GROUP BY
    rt.role
ORDER BY
    movie_count DESC
